CustomField.formula: IF( AND(TEXT(StageName) <> "Enquiry gone cold",sugati__O_Departure_Date__c > DATEVALUE(Now())) , sugati__O_Departure_Date__c - DATEVALUE(Now()), 0)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: IF( TEXT(StageName) <> "Enquiry gone cold" , O_Departure_Date__c - DATEVALUE(Now()), 0)
CustomField.label: Days to Departure
